title: mqobsidian views-manifest.v1
description: Canonical manifest of vault views that consumers resolve to open a file or folder in the mqobsidian vault. mqobsidian owns this contract as part of the single-source-of-truth model (ROADMAP Delivery A/D); consumers such as mqlaunch are read-only and resolve views by stable key, never by hardcoded path. The manifest is a top-level array of view records; this v1 codifies the format already consumed by mqlaunch (mqlaunch/config/mqobsidian/views.json) so ownership of the schema moves to the truth owner without changing the consumer format.

key.description: Stable identifier used as the consumer's CLI/menu argument. Must not be inferred from the path; renaming a key is a consumer-contract change.

label.description: Human-readable text for menus/pickers only; carries no resolution meaning.

type.description: Whether the resolved target is a file or a folder. Consumers validate the target kind against this.

relative_path.description: Vault-relative path resolved under the consumer's configured vault root (e.g. MQ_OBSIDIAN_DIR). Never absolute; never machine-specific.
